extraction_note: HTML source is a WordPress site with minimal inline styles and no embedded <style> blocks or SVG gradient definitions visible in the scraped markdown. Colour palette relies primarily on branding_json.colors, which the branding API reported with 0.9 confidence. The accent colour '#FF0000' from branding_json was demoted: pure red has no natural home in a conservative financial brand and no functional prominence evidence (no buttons, headings, or hero elements using it are confirmed in HTML source). It is excluded from the final palette. '#788D92' (secondary) is retained as a muted supporting tone. The background colour '#ECE9E4' (warm off-white/linen) is a credible light background confirmed as the site's light-scheme canvas. '#04313F' (deep teal-green) appears as primary, textPrimary, and link — all three roles pointing to the same hex, indicating it is the dominant brand colour used for text, headings, and CTAs. Font roles in branding_json.typography.fontStacks are internally inconsistent (heading stack lists 'Arpona' then 'Halyard_Display', body stack lists 'Halyard_Display') — these appear to be swapped. Cross-referencing branding_json.fonts array where Halyard Display is explicitly labelled 'heading' and Arpona is labelled 'body': treating Halyard Display as display/heading and Arpona as body, which is consistent with the fonts array. Neither font has a Google Fonts link in the HTML markdown provided, so both are sourced via json_fonts and marked accordingly. No SVG gradients, inline style hex values, or embedded CSS blocks were visible in the scraped HTML markdown. borderRadius of 5px sourced from branding_json.spacing. components object is empty in branding_json — no button component data available.

palette.name: Sentinel Deep Teal
palette.usage: Dominant brand colour for headings, body text, navigation, CTAs, and section anchors. Use as the primary canvas on dark-variant backgrounds and as the headline colour on light backgrounds.

palette.name: Warm Linen
palette.usage: Primary page canvas for light-scheme layouts. Use as the dominant background surface for infographic panels, cover image backgrounds, and section fills.

palette.name: Slate Sage
palette.usage: Supporting muted tone for subheadings, labels, secondary text, stat descriptors, dividers, and supporting UI elements. Not suitable as a dominant surface colour.

colours.proportion_rule: 60% warm linen (#ECE9E4) canvas, 30% deep teal (#04313F) for text, headers, and structural elements, 10% slate sage (#788D92) for supporting labels, muted text, and dividers

backgrounds.light_variant: Solid warm linen #ECE9E4 — a neutral, warm off-white canvas with no texture or pattern confirmed in source
backgrounds.dark_variant: Solid deep teal #04313F — used for dark sections, footers, and high-contrast hero panels

borders_and_rules.application: No border or rule styling confirmed in available source

decorative_elements: Rectangular image panels (WordPress Rectangle-xx named assets) used as full-bleed or contained photo blocks within service and hero sections
Circular avatar/badge image used in event promotion section (06c3ad4c asset, 150x150px)

iconography.colour_usage: No icon SVG elements confirmed in scraped HTML source; likely uses #04313F deep teal or #788D92 slate sage consistent with brand palette

data_visualisation.chart_aesthetic: Derived from brand patterns: minimal flat style with #ECE9E4 background, #04313F axis labels and data bars, #788D92 gridlines — clean and understated with no decorative chartjunk
data_visualisation.stat_callout_format: Large bold numeral in Halyard Display heavy weight in #04313F, small descriptor label below in Arpona regular weight in #788D92 — as observed in homepage stats (5 offices, 100+ years, 2,000+ clients)

brand_marks.logo_placement_convention: Top-left on web layout per standard WordPress header convention; centered placement suitable for social square assets

brand_guardrails.avoid: Using bright, saturated accent colours (e.g. red, orange, electric blue) anywhere in brand visuals
brand_guardrails.instead: Restrict palette strictly to #04313F deep teal, #ECE9E4 warm linen, and #788D92 slate sage — all three support the brand's conservative, trust-anchored financial identity

brand_guardrails.avoid: High-contrast neon or gradient treatments that suggest tech-startup or crypto-adjacent aesthetics
brand_guardrails.instead: Use flat, solid colour fills on #ECE9E4 or #04313F backgrounds with no gradients — the brand has no documented gradient signature

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative typefaces, script fonts, or display fonts with strong personality (e.g. slab serifs, condensed gothic)
brand_guardrails.instead: Use Halyard Display for headings and display text, Arpona for body copy — both convey measured, professional credibility

brand_guardrails.avoid: Rounded or playful corner radii (16px+) that create a soft, consumer-app feel
brand_guardrails.instead: Use 5px border-radius consistently to maintain slightly-rounded, professional card and button shapes

brand_guardrails.avoid: Dense, busy layouts with multiple competing colours, textures, or graphic elements
brand_guardrails.instead: Use generous white/linen space on #ECE9E4 canvas with #04313F anchoring headlines and structural elements — restraint is the brand's visual language

brand_guardrails.avoid: Photography or illustration with casual, playful, or digitally-rendered aesthetics
brand_guardrails.instead: Use high-quality photographic imagery of people, families, and professional settings consistent with retirement and legacy planning subject matter

generation_suffixes.core: Deep teal #04313F and warm linen #ECE9E4 colour system with slate sage #788D92 as a muted supporting tone. Halyard Display display typography paired with Arpona serif body text. Slightly-rounded 5px corners, flat surfaces with no gradients or textures. Conservative, trust-anchored financial authority register — understated premium, legacy-focused gravitas.
generation_suffixes.infographic: Deep teal #04313F structural elements and stat numerals on warm linen #ECE9E4 panels, with slate sage #788D92 labels and supporting data annotations. Halyard Display bold for headline figures, Arpona for descriptive copy. Flat geometric shapes with 5px corner radius, no gradients. Authoritative and data-restrained — every element earns its place in a measured, professional financial tone.
generation_suffixes.cover_image: Warm linen #ECE9E4 canvas with deep teal #04313F headline typography in Halyard Display bold weight. Slate sage #788D92 used for subtitle and supporting text in Arpona. Flat solid surfaces, no gradients, 5px slightly-rounded card elements. Premium conservative financial advisory tone — legacy-focused, trustworthy, quietly authoritative.
generation_suffixes.social_square: Deep teal #04313F dominant background or warm linen #ECE9E4 canvas, with Halyard Display bold headline in contrasting tone. Slate sage #788D92 for supporting label or statistic descriptor. Flat, textureless surfaces with 5px corner radius. Concise, trust-signalling, understated-premium financial brand register — no decorative clutter.
